summary: The project now has a usable local-first baseline with bounded workflow planning, tool-backed local file, CSV, and HTTP context analysis, structured outputs, audit persistence, acceptance coverage, and a minimal Streamlit UI. The current push is to make external trial use clearer through beta quickstart guidance, support boundaries, and structured feedback capture.
completed_items: Closed-loop supervisor orchestration with research, writing, and optional review stages
Bounded workflow planning that routes between research and analysis requests
Structured workflow output with pretty, JSON, and Markdown renderers
Local tool integration with file preview, CSV analysis, and bounded HTTP fetch adapters
Local audit persistence, acceptance reporting, request cache, and retry plumbing
Minimal Streamlit UI for task input, plan preview, traces, recent runs, and result export
Trial-readiness roadmap section that defines beta audience, entry surfaces, exit criteria, and feedback expectations
next_items: Manually validate the beta quickstart with first-wave external testers
Collect structured trial feedback from external users
Broaden workflow planning beyond the current bounded templates
